examples: A bead curtain separated the two rooms.
Her bead necklaces and bracelets jangled as she walked.
You can imagine a bead with a wire going through it and the bead can only slide back and forth.
Desperate clients will claim that noose around their neck is really a bead of valuable pearls.
Mr. Van Hollen also draws a bead on the last-in, first-out accounting method known as Lifo.
